reasoning: The CCCS AC-2 control focuses on account management, which in Kubernetes translates to managing RBAC entities such as ServiceAccounts, Roles, and RoleBindings. Ensuring that inactive or unused accounts and roles are identified and cleaned up aligns with the principle of least privilege and reduces potential attack surfaces. Regular reviews of user access and role assignments in Kubernetes can help maintain a secure environment.
title: CCCS AC-2: Account Management
